strategy_snapshot.topology: Custom Silicon Utility (TPU v7/v8) + Networking Fabric (Tomahawk/Jericho) + VMware Infrastructure
strategy_snapshot.primary_vector: Hyperscale ASIC co-design dominance (Google 2031 extension) vs Nvidia TCO arbitrage

add_rules.catalyst: Anthropic/Frontier model diversification (Path 2) or TP > $345.00 support retest

stop_loss_rules.fundamental_melt_down: Google TPU partnership shift or >15% reduction in TPU CAPEX
stop_loss_rules.macro_kill_switch: Data center power delays (>2 quarters) or TSMC 2nm yield failure
